prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约28664→32105→32187→35425→33896，近年整体后移（位次数字增大），近4年累计后移约5232名；2025年基准约33896名，较2024年 有所回升（位次数字减小）；本省物理类计划2021年118人、2022年121人、2023年113人、2024年116人、2025年114人；2026年计划126人，较2025年扩招 约10.5%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓和作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第56名，近年排名在54–61之间波动，整体稳定；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名未进入前100，关注度一般；地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势学科（第五轮评估数 据未收录），地球科学领域全国领先，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类等热门专业位次靠前，传统地矿类专业热度平稳；广东省20 26年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧；学校位于湖北武汉，在广东属跨省招生，近 年广东招生计划稳定在110–126人之间，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年扩招约10.5%对竞争的缓和作用、以及广东物理类考生增加约 3.6%带来的竞争加剧，两者对冲后扩招效应略占主导；在2025年基准33896名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约35838名，区间35338–36338名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28664 → 32105 → 32187 → 35425 → 33896, showing a general backward shift in recent years (ranking numbers increased), with a cumulative backward shift of about 5232 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 33896, which is a slight recovery compared to 2024 (ranking number decreased); the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 118 in 2021, 121 in 2022, 113 in 2023, 116 in 2024, and 114 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 126, an increase of about 10.5% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that will ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 56th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54 and 61, overall stable; recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps recorded; Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 100, with average attention; Geology and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional advantageous disciplines (fifth round evaluation data not included), leading nationally in Earth Sciences, providing stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information have higher rankings, while traditional geology and mining majors have stable popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and recruits across provinces in Guangdong, with the enrollment plan in Guangdong stable at 110–126 in recent years, with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward shift trend in historical rankings, the easing effect of the approximately 10.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 on competition, and the intensification of competition due to the approximately 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees, the expansion effect slightly dominates after offsetting; based on the 2025 baseline of 33896, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 35838, with a range of 35338–36338.
